checks: if command -v gcc >/dev/null 2>&1 || command -v clang >/dev/null 2>&1; then true; else echo 'Missing C/C++ compiler (gcc or clang)' >&2; exit 1; fi

if [ -f CMakeLists.txt ]; then cmake -S . -B build/lab-release -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DBUILD_TESTING=ON && cmake --build build/lab-release -j; elif [ -f Makefile ]; then make -j; else echo 'Missing CMakeLists.txt or Makefile' >&2; exit 1; fi

if [ -f CMakeLists.txt ]; then ctest --test-dir build/lab-release --output-on-failure; elif [ -x ./build/tests/runTests ]; then ./build/tests/runTests; else echo 'No standard test entrypoint detected (ctest or ./build/tests/runTests)' >&2; exit 1; fi
